title: teamcity.toml
description: Repository-level binding to one or more TeamCity servers. Each [[server]] entry pins a TeamCity instance and a default project/job, with optional per-subdirectory scopes for monorepos. Consumed by the `teamcity` CLI and IDE integrations.

server.description: List of [[server]] entries binding this repo to TeamCity instances.

id.description: TeamCity external ID (project or build configuration). Letters, digits, and underscores only.

scope.description: Project/job binding for a server or for a per-path override.

project.description: Default TeamCity project external ID for this scope.

job.description: Default build configuration (`job`) external ID for this scope.

jobs.description: Additional build configuration external IDs exposed in this scope.

server.description: One TeamCity instance binding. `url` is required; everything else is optional and may also live under `paths` for monorepo subdirectory overrides.

url.description: Base URL of the TeamCity server, e.g. https://teamcity.example.com.

project.description: Default TeamCity project external ID for this server entry.

job.description: Default build configuration (`job`) external ID for this server entry.

jobs.description: Additional build configuration external IDs exposed by this server entry.

paths.description: Per-subdirectory scope overrides keyed by repo-relative path (forward slashes; no leading slash). The deepest matching path wins when resolving the active scope for the cwd.
